mapper.select: select id, order_no, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_extension, upload_username, upload_display_name, created_at from work_order_attachment where id = #{id}

select id, order_no, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_extension, upload_username, upload_display_name, created_at from work_order_attachment where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_attachment where order_no = #{orderNo}
select COALESCE(sum(file_size), 0) from work_order_attachment where order_no = #{orderNo}
